name: New Gold Inc.
description: New Gold Inc. is a Canadian-focused intermediate gold mining company engaged in the operation, development, and exploration of mineral properties. The company maintains a portfolio of core producing assets in Canada, including the Rainy River gold-silver mine in Ontario and the New Afton gold-copper mine in British Columbia. Committed to responsible mining practices, New Gold focuses on operational excellence and growth in stable jurisdictions to generate value for its shareholders and stakeholders. The company is headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, and is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol NGD.
